title: Rain-Day Strength Maintenance
objective: Use the rainy day for strength maintenance while absorbing Saturday's threshold check.
why_now: Saturday's threshold check passed and you feel rested, but rain makes the outdoor endurance ride low-probability. Gym is the default; a clean dry window can replace it with easy aerobic volume.

source_context.week_objective: Restart rhythm and validate threshold readiness without catch-up fatigue.

targets.notes: Default: 60 min gym. Lower body RPE 5-6 with 2-3 reps in reserve; upper body RPE 6-7. No failure, no finisher. If a clean dry outdoor window appears, replace gym with 2h00-2h15 easy endurance at 55-68% of working FTP 260w, no tempo finish.

centr_recommendation.primary: Centr full-body or upper/lower strength session, using the coach table as the prescription
alternatives: Strength for Sports upper-body plus lower-body basics
centr_recommendation.notes: Use Centr for demos or substitutions; keep lower body controlled after Saturday and let upper body work honestly.

gym_table.notes: Controlled, not maximal. Stop with 2-3 reps in reserve.

gym_table.exercise: Dumbbell bench press or machine chest press

nutrition.pre: Normal meal 2-4h before. If training hungry, take 20-30g carbs plus 10-20g protein 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst, roughly 400-750ml/hour. If the outdoor ride happens, use 30-50g carbs/hour.
nutrition.post: Protein-forward meal/snack with 25-35g protein; add 30-60g carbs if dinner is delayed, or 60-90g carbs if you replace gym with the outdoor ride.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required for gym; electrolytes/sodium only if the outdoor ride is hot or sweaty. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Protein-forward meal/snack and easy walking if legs feel stiff.
recovery.evening: No extra lower-body work after gym. Protect sleep.
recovery.next_morning_check: If soreness is more than mild, reduce Tuesday gym lower-body work or move strength later.

skill_focus.action: Keep lower-body reps controlled and symmetrical, especially through the left calf/ankle chain.
skill_focus.why: Strength supports durable power only if it does not create compensation after Saturday's threshold work.

skill_focus.action: Upper body can work honestly; lower body stops with 2-3 reps in reserve.
skill_focus.why: This keeps the strength signal without stealing freshness from next week's FTP work.

mental_focus.intention: Use the day, do not force the day.
mental_focus.why: The goal is sustained FTP progression, so weather should redirect the stimulus without turning Sunday into fatigue chasing.
mental_focus.reset: If you catch yourself trying to make up for rain, cut the extra work and finish with clean reps or easy endurance only.

pre_interval_cues: Default is gym if rain makes the ride awkward.
Outdoor replacement is allowed only with a clean dry window and normal legs.
during_workout_cues: Upper body can work harder than legs.
execution_notes.if_too_easy: Add one upper-body accessory set, not heavy leg volume. If riding outside, cap at 2h15.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: Reduce lower-body work to one set each or make it mobility only.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Finish feeling trained, not sore or depleted.
